/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 2.0.0 -current_version 2.5.0 -o libpromptbim.2.5.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libpromptbim.2.dylib CMakeFiles/promptbim.dir/src/compliance/compliance_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/promptbim.dir/src/cost/cost_engine.cpp.o
